articles.title: A Doctor Who Loves Vaccines AND Healthy Food Might Be America's Top Doc!
articles.summary: Dr. Nicole Saphier is President Trump's pick for surgeon general. She likes vaccines more than some in his team and once called a health report 'embarrassing.' She's a cancer doctor and mom of three.

articles.title: Spirit Airlines Stops Flying: What Happens to Cheap Flights?
articles.summary: Spirit Airlines, known for super cheap tickets, stopped all flights on May 2, 2026. The company ran out of money after years of problems and couldn't get a $500 million bailout from the government.

articles.title: Spain Says Israel 'Kidnapped' a Spanish Man from a Gaza Aid Boat!
articles.summary: Israel arrested a Spanish man named Saif Abukeshek from a flotilla trying to bring aid to Gaza. Spain's foreign minister called it a 'kidnapping' and demanded his release.
